ItacPersonItem.Notes: A member of the Spregiati Academy in Palermo not mentioned by Maylender. For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Angeli Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, pp. 56-57 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
